model_type: Calibrated specialist ensemble with optimized weighted blend

specialists.poisson_scoreline_model: Two Poisson regressors for expected goals and scoreline probabilities
specialists.full_xgboost: XGBoost model on all historical features
specialists.draw_risk_classifier: Binary XGBoost classifier for draw risk
specialists.fifa_rank_points_specialist: Current-team-only FIFA rank/points heuristic for explanation, not training target
specialists.context_adjustment: Optional conservative heuristic for rest/travel/weather values supplied at prediction time

prediction_scope: Only the 48 World Cup 2026 teams are accepted.
